chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 215 of 2025 SCRA 216 of 2025 SCRA 217 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2707/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.10. 3. For orders on CMA No.2708/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No.2709/2025. 22.12.2025 Mr. Noor Nabi, advocate holding brief for Mr. Faheem Raza, Khuhro advocate for the applicant. 1. Urgency granted. Despite repeated requests counsel remains unable to assist as to what questions of law arising, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
